name: default
description: Reference Live2D model for the omnilimb-face plugin: the Mao (Cubism 4) sample from Live2D's official CubismWebSamples, loaded from CDN so the example works out of the box. Mao is richer than the Haru greeter — it ships 8 expressions (exp_01..exp_08, mapped below) and 8 motions (2 Idle + 6 TapBody, including 3 'special' reactions) for visibly varied reactions. Swap `url` for your own Cubism `*.model3.json` (and align `emotionMap` to that model's expression list) to use a different avatar; the canvas placeholder front-end ignores `url`. Lip-sync, expression and motion-group differences are handled automatically by avatar.js (it reads the model's declared LipSync param and resolves tap-like motion groups).
